ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_number" TEXT /* The jersey number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college/university the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The pick number in the draft */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* The expiration date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* The name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of assistant coaches */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2014-15) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "num_of_teams" INTEGER /* The number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "totals" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played across all seasons */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored across all seasons */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made across all seasons */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made across all seasons */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made across all seasons */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played across all seasons */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers across all seasons */,
  "total_personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls across all seasons */,
  "total_double_doubles" INTEGER /* Total double-doubles across all seasons */,
  "total_triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Total triple-doubles across all seasons */,
  "total_efficiency_rating" INTEGER /* Total player efficiency rating across all seasons */,
  "total_plus_minus" INTEGER /* Total plus-minus rating across all seasons */,
  "total_offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total offensive rebounds across all seasons */,
  "total_defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total defensive rebounds across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_attempts_2pt" INTEGER /* Total two-point field goal attempts across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_made_2pt" INTEGER /* Total two-point field goals made across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_attempts_3pt" INTEGER /* Total three-point field goal attempts across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_made_3pt" INTEGER /* Total three-point field goals made across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_attempts_inside_10ft" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts inside 10 feet across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_made_inside_10ft" INTEGER /* Total field goals made inside 10 feet across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_attempts_10ft_to_16ft" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts between 10 and 16 feet across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_made_10ft_to_16ft" INTEGER /* Total field goals made between 10 and 16 feet across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_attempts_16ft_to_3pt" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts between 16 feet and the three-point line across all seasons */,
  "total_field_goal_made_16ft_to_3pt" INTEGER /* Total field goals made between 16 feet and the three-point line across all seasons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_totals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user, linking to user_roles */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
